    Fields

    Name Description
    M11

    Value at row 1, column 1 of the matrix.
    M12

    Value at row 1, column 2 of the matrix.

    Value at row 1, column 3 of the matrix.

    Value at row 1, column 4 of the matrix.

    Value at row 3, column 1 of the matrix.
    M32

    Value at row 3, column 4 of the matrix.

    Value at row 4, column 1 of the matrix.
    M42

    Value at row 4, column 2 of the matrix.
    M43

    Value at row 4, column 3 of the matrix.
    M44

    Value at row 4, column 4 of the matrix.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Identity

    Returns the multiplicative identity matrix.
    Translation

    Gets or sets the translation component of this matrix.

    Methods

    Name Description
    CreateFromQuaternion(Quaternion)

    Creates a rotation matrix from the given Quaternion rotation value.
    CreateScale(double, double, double)

    Creates a scaling matrix.
    CreateTranslation(double, double, double)

    Creates a translation matrix.
    Equals(Matrix4x4Double)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether this matrix instance is equal to the other given matrix.
    Equals(object)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the given Object is equal to this matrix instance.
    GetHashCode()

    Returns the hash code for this instance.
    Invert(Matrix4x4Double, out Matrix4x4Double)

    Attempts to calculate the inverse of the given matrix. If successful, result will contain the inverted matrix.
    Multiply(Matrix4x4Double, Matrix4x4Double)

    Multiplies a matrix by another matrix.

    Operators

    Name Description
    operator ==(Matrix4x4Double, Matrix4x4Double)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the given two matrices are equal.
    explicit operator Matrix4x4(Matrix4x4Double)

    Converts a Matrix4x4Double to a Matrix4x4
    implicit operator Matrix4x4Double(Matrix4x4)

    converts from Matrix4x4 to Matrix4x4Double
    operator !=(Matrix4x4Double, Matrix4x4Double)

    Returns a boolean indicating whether the given two matrices are not equal.

    Multiplies a matrix by another matrix.
